title: Tech Tuesday: Agentic AI Summit, AI-powered Fabric Inspection, and More
description: This week's Tech Tuesday column looks at Digital Wave Technology and ChannelEngine partnership and a new fabric inspection machine by EagleAi.

title: Anthropic, Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs Launch Enterprise AI Services Firm
description: Anthropic has announced a strategic partnership with Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs to establish a new AI-native enterprise services company aimed at accelerating artificial intelligence adoption across businesses. The newly formed standalone entity will focus on integrating Anthropic’s Claude AI models directly into core enterprise operations, enabling organizations to modernize workflows, improve efficiency, [...] The post Anthropic, Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, and Goldman Sachs Launch Enterprise AI Services Firm appeared first on ITDigest .

title: State Supreme Court orders redo in Hannah Payne case after bogus AI citations
description: The Supreme Court of Georgia has sent convicted murderer Hannah Payne’s bid for a new trial back to a Clayton County judge.

title: Coinbase Layoffs 2026: 700 Jobs Cut as Brian Armstrong Bets Big on AI to Build Leaner Teams
description: Coinbase reduces headcount by about 14% to create AI-focused, leaner teams and lower costs, aiming to better weather crypto volatility and prepare for future growth.

title: Consumers blame AI customer service failures on the brand not the tech
description: Although 71 percent of Americans have interacted with AI-powered customer service in the last year, trust is not keeping pace with adoption according to a new report, The study from Delight.ai surveyed 1,000 US adults and shows consumers judge the brand for the functionality of AI systems and not the technology itself. 83 percent agree that the brand should be held accountable if an AI-powered interaction goes wrong, and 82 percent expect AI to meet the same standards as a human representative. Interestingly 64 percent say AI needs to actually outperform humans to maintain their confidence. When an AI interaction... [Continue Reading]
